issue.title: 🚨 Content of the task deleted when a checkbox was created
issue.body: ### Version Used v18.7.0W Windows11 ### Current Behavior If you create a new task in the board view and then try to add a checkbox, the entire content (note) of the task is deleted and a single checkbox is inserted instead (see video). The text in the ‘note’ in the video was pre-set (Settings -> Tasks). However, I've also had it happen before that the entire text was deleted when I'd already written something by myself. Otherwise, I’m happy with the checkbox feature and grateful that it’s available. ### Expected Behavior When I create a checkbox, it should be inserted at the last cursor position. Alternatively, it can simply be inserted at the end of the text. Under no circumstances, however, should the existing text be deleted. ### Steps to Reproduce see video ### Can you reproduce this reliably? Yes, I can reproduce it reliably. ### Console Output ```shell ``` ### Documentation - [ ] The documentation/[wiki](https://github.com/super-productivity/super-productivity/wiki) is unclear or incorrect for this case. - [ ] There should be a note added to the documentation/[wiki](https://github.com/super-productivity/super-productivity/wiki) for this case.

fidelityNote: Same vet round as #7785, same repo/history facts.
